dashboard.title: Administration overview
dashboard.description: Review where employer registrations stand and act on anything waiting on you.

pending.body: {count, plural, one {# employer registration is waiting for a decision.} other {# employer registrations are waiting for a decision.}}
pending.zero: No employer registrations are waiting for review right now.

employers.title: Employer approvals
employers.description: Approve, reject, suspend, or restore employer accounts. Every decision is recorded by the platform.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by company, contact, or email

queue.emptyBody: No employer accounts match the current filter. Adjust the status or search to see more.

reviews.title: Review moderation
reviews.description: Review published company reviews and remove a review or its reply when needed. Every deletion is recorded by the platform.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by reviewer, title, or text

reviews.emptyBody: No reviews match the current company or search. Adjust the filters to see more.

feedback.reviewDeleted: The review by {reviewer} has been deleted.
feedback.replyDeleted: The reply to {reviewer}'s review has been deleted.

delete.reviewDescription: Permanently delete the review by {reviewer} for {company}? This cannot be undone.
delete.replyDescription: Permanently delete the employer reply to {reviewer}'s review for {company}? This cannot be undone.

reject.title: Reject this employer
reject.description: Provide a reason for rejecting {company}. The employer can see this reason and resubmit.
reject.reasonHint: Be specific and constructive so the employer can correct the issue.
reject.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Company registration number could not be verified.
reject.reasonRequired: A reason is required to reject an employer.
